scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Workflow engines, DAGs, assets, Snakefiles, lazy/parallel task graphs, distributed arrays/dataframes, feature stores, cloud compute orchestration, and production data pipelines.
scenarios.role: 1 workflows, including Snakefile authoring, CLI execution, configuration/data validation, deployment/storage, reporting/testing, and Python API/plugin usage.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `snakemake` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: configuration data, debugging reporting, deployment storage, execution cli, python api plugins, and workflow authoring.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `snakemake` when the request names `snakemake`, centers on Create, run, debugging, deploy, and programmatically inspect Snakemake 9.23.1 workflows, including Snakefile authoring, CLI execution, configuration/data validation, deployment/storage, reporting/testing, and Python API/plugin usage, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in data orchestration and parallel computing. Then route to configuration data, debugging reporting, deployment storage, or execution CLI when those focused workflows match.
